Name: Network of Excellence on Land Governance in Africa -NELGA
Description:
To strengthen human and institutional capacities for implementing the AU Agenda on Land, the African Land Policy Centre established NELGA in cooperation with the German Development Cooperation (GIZ) and other partners. 

NELGA is a partnership of leading African universities and research institutions with proven leadership in education, training and research on land governance. These universities and institutions are known as Centres of Excellence (CoE) and promote the AU Land Agenda at national and regional levels.  

NELGA has more than 70 partners CoEs working on capacity development, land curricula reviews, original research and policy recommendations. NELGA supports researchers in sharing their knowledge with policymakers to promote secured land rights.

Name: National Sustainable Land Use Policy of Papua New Guinea (NSLUP 2022-2032)
Description:
To promote the best sustainable use of land in Papua New Guinea for the interest of all people with effective partnership with stakeholders to achieve responsible sustainable social, economic, infrastructural, environmental and physical advancement consistent with our National Goals and Directive Principles, and coherent with all other relevant policies and pieces of legislation.

 The National Sustainable Land Use Policy (NSLUP 2022-2033) developed successfully through a closed consultative and collaborations process with all the Land Use Stakeholders, Private Sectors, NGO’s, Church Reps, Civil societies and Subnational level stakeholders including community representatives The DLPP has taken the lead role as a mandated department to manage and making land available to promote the best use of land in PNG in the interest of all citizens, individually and collectively by ensuring that an orderly process exists to be made available for sustainable economic and social developments and that land rights are guaranteed.

The need for stakeholders within the land and land resources sector to embrace the policy measures and planning strategies adopted within the National Sustainable Land Use Policy to address the issues posed by urbanization and the conservation of traditional land use with effort to improve the social and economic wellbeing of the citizens of the country.

This is an over-arching policy framework for sustainable land use in PNG will see the preparation of a Strategic land Use Plan for the country. The Strategic Land Use Plan will identify and broadly categorize the use of land into areas of Urban Development to be known as Development Promotion Areas. These are areas identified and to be broadly categorized as Conservation Areas to be protected and remainder of the area in the rural areas as sustainable rural development Areas to remain under traditional land use with emphasis to Promote Rural Development.

Name: China Town
Description:
A Chinatown (Chinese: 唐人街) is an ethnic enclave of Chinese people located outside Greater China, most often in an urban setting. Areas known as "Chinatown" exist throughout the world, including Europe, Asia, Africa, Oceania, and the Americas.

The development of most Chinatowns typically resulted from mass migration to an area without any or with very few Chinese residents. Binondo in Manila, established in 1594, is recognized as the world's oldest Chinatown. Notable early examples outside Asia include San Francisco's Chinatown in the United States and Melbourne's Chinatown in Australia, which were founded in the mid-19th century during the California and Victoria gold rushes, respectively. A more modern example, in Montville, Connecticut, was caused by the displacement of Chinese workers in the Manhattan's Chinatown following the September 11th attacks in 2001.

Name: Bank Holiday Land

Land remains one of the UK’s most secure assets. We provide clear pathways for investors to access opportunities with growth potential.

By connecting landowners with forward-thinking investors, we highlight the potential of land in areas where future planning permission and land use changes may deliver strong returns.

Name: GeoNexa, LLC
Description:
At GeoNexa, PLLC, we bridge the gap between cutting-edge technology and traditional land surveying principles to deliver precision-driven results. With a focus on boundary surveys, ALTA/NSPS surveys, lot fit analysis, home layouts, orthographic mapping, topographic surveys, and subdivisions, we provide accurate and efficient solutions tailored to meet our clients' needs.

Our team specializes in drone-based LiDAR and photogrammetry, allowing us to capture high-resolution data quickly and cost-effectively. Whether it’s large-scale developments, real estate transactions, or infrastructure projects, we ensure that our clients receive the most reliable and actionable insights.

Why GeoNexa?
 Unmatched Accuracy – Utilizing advanced GNSS, LiDAR, and photogrammetry technology
 Efficiency & Automation – Streamlined workflows for faster project turnaround
 Regulatory Expertise – Adherence to National CAD Standards & state regulations
 Client-Centric Approach – Clear communication, reliable results, and industry-leading service

We proudly serve North Carolina, South Carolina, and beyond, offering customized surveying solutions that support engineers, developers, architects, and real estate professionals.

Through our Preferred Vendor Program, we partner with real estate agents and brokerages, providing volume-based discounts, priority scheduling, and annual rewards for top referrers.

At GeoNexa, we don’t just measure land—we redefine precision. Let’s build the future together.

 Serving NC, SC & surrounding areas
 Visit us at www.geonexallc.com
 Connect with us to discuss your next project!

Explore our Vision
OUR MISSION
Pioneering Solutions for a Thriving Planet

Our core initiatives — BlueForest, BlueHaven & BlueRetreat — are powered by the revolutionary capabilities of blockchain and tokenization. We are dedicated to addressing critical issues from environmental conservation and self-sufficient, resilient living to spiritual renewal and personal well-being.

Our mission, rooted in the philosophy of ‘think global, act local’, starts with impactful projects in Panama, but is designed to expand to other stunning and stable beachfront regions in the Caribbean.

Name: Its Just Land
Description:
Our unique approach focuses on acquiring land without making improvements, allowing us to capitalize on the inherent value of the land itself.

We have mastered the art of identifying hidden gems in the real estate market. By employing expert analysis and market insights, we acquire undervalued properties in areas that are often overlooked or underestimated. Our strategic approach enables us to secure these properties at favorable prices, providing an opportunity for substantial returns on investment.

Our investment strategy revolves around undervalued markets and properties with perceived undesirable characteristics. While others may view these properties as challenges, we see them as hidden opportunities. Through thorough evaluation of zoning regulations, environmental considerations, and access to utilities, we identify creative solutions and potential development avenues.

Investing in our land company offers several advantages. Firstly, it provides a diversified portfolio addition. Land investments historically exhibit low correlation with other asset classes, mitigating risk and enhancing overall portfolio performance. Secondly, our focus on undervalued markets and properties presents an opportunity for significant capital appreciation as these areas experience growth and increased demand over time.

Our streamlined approach ensures efficient operations and cost-effective management. By eliminating the need for improvements, we minimize overhead expenses, allowing us to pass on higher returns to our valued investors.

Looking into the future to keep growing and expanding we will be joining efforts with a higher number of investors that are looking for oppurtinites where cash flow is a priority. The company will be having several open spots for investors that would like to partner up with us allowing the company to keep expanding while making everyone money.

Description:
Stacey Surveying is a Melbourne-based land surveying firm providing precise, high-quality surveying services across Melbourne Metro and Regional Victoria. We work with developers, architects, town planners, builders, and property owners to deliver reliable, accurate surveys that form the foundation for successful projects.

With a strong focus on cadastral surveying and development support, our expertise covers Feature & Level Surveys, Title Re-Establishment, Subdivisions, Consolidations, Easement Removal, Boundary Disputes, and Large-Scale Development Surveys. We also offer drone-based aerial mapping and advanced site measurement services, giving clients accurate data in less time.

Our approach is guided by three core principles – experience, insight, results. Every project benefits from years of industry knowledge, a detailed understanding of local council and state planning requirements, and the latest surveying technology. This ensures our clients receive survey plans that are not only accurate, but also clear, compliant, and ready for use in design, planning, and construction.

We pride ourselves on building strong, long-term relationships with our clients. By working closely with project teams, we help to identify potential challenges early, streamline approvals, and keep developments moving on time and within budget. From small residential extensions to multi-stage commercial projects, our work is trusted by leading industry professionals who value both precision and proactive communication.

Whether you need to confirm title boundaries, prepare subdivision plans, merge lots to reduce land tax, or meet planning permit conditions, Stacey Surveying delivers dependable surveying solutions tailored to your needs.

Name: Rockingham Park Pty Ltd
Description:
Rockingham Park Pty Ltd (RPPL) has developed land for over 60 years. The company played a pivotal role in Rockingham’s rapid development as one of the WA Government’s five new regional centres, alongside Joondalup, Midland, Armadale, and Fremantle. 

RPPL developed and sold over 4,000 homesites during the 15 years from 1969 to 1984, as well as selling broadacre land to other housing developers and forming joint ventures to encourage a faster rate of development. In 1971, it started construction of the Rockingham City Shopping Centre, now known as the Rockingham Centre.

New communities followed in Waikiki (Harrington Waters plus the Waikiki Village Shopping Centre), Hibiscus Hammond Park and in Baldivis (Heritage Park, 545 Baldivis, Parkland Heights and Woodlands Baldivis). 

Rockingham Park’s current estates are Parkland Heights and Woodlands Baldivis. 

Waikiki Village Shopping Centre is still owned and managed by RPPL and construction on the new Parkland Heights Shopping Centre will commence soon. 

From this original company, the Summit Homes Group was formed to offer land clients everything they needed to build their new home; construction, finance, settlement and real estate services and the Group is a leader in the Perth construction industry.

Description:
At ARN Project Management, we help land developers, municipalities, and infrastructure partners deliver successful land development projects - on time, on budget and with confidence.

Based in Ontario, Canada we specialize in project management, development consulting, and engineering design services for residential, commercial, and mixed-use developments. From initial planning through to approvals and construction, our team brings technical expertise, regulatory insight, and a proactive, solutions-driven mindset to every stage of development.

What We Do:
 Project Management: Coordinating consultants, schedules, permits, and budgets from concept to completion
 Engineering Design: Civil engineering for site servicing, stormwater, roadworks, grading, and infrastructure
 Development Consulting: Strategic guidance on land use, approvals, and stakeholder engagement

Where We Work:
Serving communities across Ontario, including the Greater Toronto Area, Durham, York, Peel, Halton, Simcoe, and beyond.

 Residential subdivision developments in York Region and Durham
 Stormwater and site servicing design for infill and brownfield sites

Name: The Residences – Wairakei
Description:
For over half a century, Wairakei Golf + Sanctuary has been one of New Zealand’s most prestigious golfing destinations. Now, a rare opportunity awaits to call it home.

Tucked within the serenity of Wairakei Golf + Sanctuary, The Residences offer an exclusive chance to own a freehold section and design a home in one of New Zealand’s most breathtaking landscapes. Here, world-class golf meets untouched nature, creating a private retreat where luxury and tranquillity exist in perfect balance.

With only 30 residential sections available, this is your chance to build a life where every morning begins with birdsong and every evening ends in stillness, all just moments from the natural beauty of Taupō.

This is more than land. It’s a once-in-a-generation opportunity to live within one of New Zealand’s most serene and protected environments.

Name: The Shamba Developments
Description:
Welcome to The Shamba Developments, where we create extraordinary living experiences along the enchanting North Coast of Kenya!

Immerse yourself in our captivating developments that redefine coastal luxury. The Shamba Creek Residence in Mtwapa, established in 2018, graces a sprawling 100-acre old mango farm. With only 4 plots left, this exclusive project has captivated discerning individuals seeking unparalleled tranquility.

Embark on a new chapter of coastal living with our latest masterpiece, The Shamba Kuruwitu in Vipingo. Nestled within a 130-acre former dairy, mango, and Cashews farm, this exquisite development is just moments away from the main road, pristine beaches, and the prestigious PGA-certified Vipingo Ridge golf course.

Discover meticulously designed properties built to the highest standards, offering an idyllic blend of serenity and luxury. Join us on our LinkedIn page to witness the evolution of our remarkable projects and stay informed about our latest ventures.

At The Shamba, we specialize in transforming prime locations, including old farms, into beautifully planned residential gated communities. Our meticulously curated plots, available in 1/4 and 1/2 acre parcels, provide an extraordinary canvas for your dream home.

The Shamba Creek Residence in Mtwapa is now 98% occupied, a testament to its allure. Meanwhile, Phase 1 in Vipingo is well underway, with 50% of our coveted 1/2 acre plots already sold. You are invited to explore and select your desired plot in this exceptional development.

Experience the beauty firsthand through site visits, available Monday to Saturday, from 8 am to 5.30 pm. Contact us at +254113405330 to embark on this extraordinary journey and schedule your personalized site visit.

Join us at The Shamba Developments and unlock a world of coastal splendour. Your dream lifestyle awaits!

When it comes to investing, property investing can be a passive investment choice. Property development can be a very active choice with many moving parts. With the demand for housing in Australia growing exponentially, I invite you to be part of the solution. In my opinion, land development and land subdivision are the best form of investment you can make.  

You cannot break, lose or steal land. If you find and execute the right project, you can achieve great results, income and lifestyle.

Name: AELO-TAP
Description:
Nós somos a Associação das Empresas de Loteamentos e Desenvolvimento Urbano do Triângulo Mineiro e Alto Paranaíba (Aelo-TAP), uma entidade, criada em 11 de janeiro de 2016, com sede em Uberlândia que conta com o apoio do Sindicato da Habitação Triângulo Mineiro e Alto Paranaíba (SECOVI-Tap).

Nosso intuito como associação é reunir e representar as empresas da área de loteamento e desenvolvimento urbano dos 66 municípios que compreendem as regiões do Triângulo Mineiro e do Alto Paranaíba, trabalhando junto a órgãos públicos reguladores, autarquias, ministério público cooperando entre si, para que a legislação atuante sobre o setor, seja interpretada de forma justa e igualitária.

Como o setor de loteamento passa pelos mais diversos desafios, seja a invasão e queimadas de áreas, procedimentos públicos complexos e algumas vezes lentidão na aprovação dos projetos dos novos loteamentos. Entramos como um apoio para os seus associados conseguirem desenvolver os seus projetos. Pois são eles os maiores geradores de emprego, renda e moradia para a população.

Name: "Yangi Avlod" Special Industrial Zone
Description:
Yangi Avlod Special Industrial Zone is a key driver of Uzbekistan’s new industrial development. Strategically located between Tashkent and New Tashkent, the zone provides direct access to major transport, energy, and logistics networks, ensuring reliable connectivity for investors and manufacturers.

Established under the Presidential Decree of March 25, 2024, Yangi Avlod is designed as a modern platform for high-value industrial projects and international cooperation.

Key parameters:
• Area: 765 hectares
• 25 investment projects worth USD 510 million
• Planned total investment exceeding USD 1 billion
• More than 10,000 new jobs to be created

Resident benefits:
• Up to 10 years of exemption from profit tax, VAT, and customs duties
• One-stop administrative support
• Fully developed infrastructure, including road networks, gas and water supply, electricity, and telecommunications

Yangi Avlod represents a focused, sustainable, and technology-driven approach to industrial growth. It brings together innovation, efficiency, and global partnerships to shape the next stage of Uzbekistan’s economic progress.

Name: Urban Infill Developments
Description:
At Urban Infill Developments, we believe that every piece of land has a unique story to tell, and we’re here to help you write yours. As a leading land developer, our mission goes beyond simply selling land. We collaborate with leading builders in Western Australia to construct exceptional properties, crafting vibrant and magnificent communities that reflect the spirit of their surroundings.

UNIQUE DEVELOPMENTS
Each of our land developments are carefully selected for its potential to become part of a thriving community. Whether you’re looking for a place to build your dream home or seeking a prime investment opportunity, we provide a range of land opportunities designed to meet your needs. 

WORK WITH URBAN INFILL DEVELOPMENTS 
At Urban Infill Developments, our team offers a comprehensive range of services tailored to meet your unique needs and ensure successful outcomes. Here’s how we can work together:

• Property Development Management: From concept to completion, we manage all aspects of property development. Our experienced developments team will oversee your projects, co-ordinating with architects, contractors, and stakeholders to deliver results on time and within budget.

• Land Acquisition: Navigating the complexities of land acquisition can be challenging. We provide expert advice and strategic insights to help you identify and secure the right land for your project.

• Land Development and Subdivision: Transforming land into vibrant communities is our specialty. Our team will assist you in planning, designing, and executing your land development and subdivision projects, ensuring compliance with local regulations and community standards.

• Land Consulting: Our consulting services provide valuable insights and strategies to optimise your land use. We help you navigate zoning laws, environmental regulations, and provide market trends.

Contact Urban Infill Developments to find out more: 
Ph: 08 9483 0089
E: info@urbaninfilldevelopments.com.au

Name: Infraeco Urbanismo
Description:
Somos uma empresa líder no setor de desenvolvimento de loteamentos e projetos de infraestrutura. Com uma reputação consolidada, estamos comprometidos em oferecer serviços de alta qualidade, inovação e sustentabilidade em todas as etapas dos nossos projetos.

Nossa equipe de especialistas altamente qualificados possui ampla experiência no planejamento, projeto, construção e gestão de loteamentos residenciais e comerciais. Trabalhamos em estreita colaboração com arquitetos, engenheiros e urbanistas para criar espaços funcionais, atrativos e bem planejados, que atendam às necessidades dos nossos clientes e comunidades.
Além disso, somos especializados no desenvolvimento de projetos de infraestrutura que promovem o desenvolvimento sustentável. Priorizamos soluções ambientalmente responsáveis, incorporando práticas inovadoras e tecnologias avançadas para minimizar o impacto nos recursos naturais, garantir a eficiência energética e criar ambientes resilientes.

Nossa abordagem centrada no cliente nos permite entender e atender às necessidades específicas de cada projeto. Valorizamos a transparência, a comunicação aberta e o trabalho em equipe, mantendo nossos clientes informados em todas as etapas do processo.
